hero.descLine3: crafted with care, for unforgettable taste.

history.title: WHAT WE DO
history.subtitle: Artisanal Kitchen
history.intro1: At Kasa Saffron Croqueteria Y Catering, we transform a traditional Spanish recipe into a contemporary gourmet experience. We were born with a clear vision: to offer high-quality artisanal croquettes, made with selected ingredients and meticulously careful processes.
history.intro2: Each croquette represents a balance between texture, flavor, and presentation. Our production combines traditional techniques with modern standards of hygiene and consistency, guaranteeing a homogeneous product for both the final customer and professional catering.
history.feat1Desc: Each croquette represents a balance between texture, flavor, and presentation. Our production combines traditional techniques with modern standards of hygiene and consistency.
history.feat2Desc: We guarantee a homogeneous product for both the final customer and professional catering, always committed to quality, authenticity, and attention to detail.
history.feat3Desc: Classic flavors and creative combinations adapted to today's market.
history.feat4Desc: Service designed for restaurants, caterings, and supermarkets in Barcelona.

stories.chetnaP1: Chetna's passion for cooking began in her father's kitchen in India, where she learned the art of combining spices and creating memorable flavors.
stories.chetnaP2: After training at Barcelona's best culinary schools and specializing in pastry, Chetna decided to create Kasa Saffron as a tribute to her roots and her love for the Spanish croquette.
stories.chetnaP3: Her vision is simple but ambitious: to transform the humble croquette into a first-class gastronomic experience, using only natural ingredients and artisan techniques.
stories.lovieshP1: With culinary training in Switzerland and professional experience at some of the world's most prestigious luxury hotels, Loviesh brings an unparalleled level of excellence to Kasa Saffron.
stories.lovieshP2: His career includes positions in the United States, Switzerland, and Spain, culminating with a master's in hotel management in Spain.

b2b.heroDesc: Premium croquetas for restaurants, cafés, hotels, retailers, and distributors. Handcrafted in Barcelona with 100% natural ingredients.
b2b.sec4Desc: Each croqueta is handcrafted using time-honoured techniques and the finest natural ingredients.
b2b.sec6Quote: Kasa Saffron's croquetas have become the signature item on our tapas menu. The consistency, quality, and flavour are unmatched — our guests keep coming back for more.
b2b.sec6AuthorRole: Head Chef, Restaurant Cal Pep — Barcelona
b2b.sec8Desc: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a personalized quote and complimentary sample pack.
bullets: Free sample pack for your team

formPlaceholders.notes: Tell us about your business, the flavours you're interested in, and your expected order frequency...

b2b.privacy: Your information is safe with us. We respect your privacy.

benefits.title: Consistent Quality

benefits.title: Premium Ingredients

benefits.title: Reliable Delivery
benefits.desc: 24–48 hour delivery across Barcelona. Temperature-controlled for freshness.

benefits.title: Custom Orders
benefits.desc: Need a bespoke flavour? We develop exclusive recipes for your menu.

benefits.title: Hospitality Ready
benefits.desc: Individually portioned and packaged. Ready to fry in 3 minutes.

process.title: Inquiry
process.desc: Reach out through our form or WhatsApp. Tell us about your business and what you're looking for.

process.title: Sampling
process.desc: We prepare a complimentary sample pack so you can taste the quality first-hand.

process.title: Approval
process.desc: Work with our team to select your flavours, volumes, and delivery schedule.

process.title: Production
process.desc: Your order is handcrafted in our industrial kitchen using artisan techniques.

process.title: Delivery
process.desc: Frozen fresh croquetas delivered to your door within 24–48 hours.

items.name: Classic Jamón Ibérico
items.description: Traditional Spanish croqueta filled with rich, savory Iberian cured ham in a creamy, melt-in-your-mouth bechamel sauce.

items.name: Earthy Boletus Mushrooms
items.description: Sautéed wild porcini mushrooms blended into a smooth cream — a vegetarian specialty rich in deep forest aroma.

items.name: Traditional Cod (Bacalao)
items.description: A coastal tapas classic featuring finely flaked salted cod, garlic, and fresh parsley, fried to crisp golden perfection.

items.name: Signature Roast Chicken
items.description: Our house specialty: tender slow-roasted chicken breast infused with the delicate aroma of premium herbs and spices.

items.name: Creamy Cabrales Blue Cheese
items.description: A daring bite featuring Spanish blue cheese, beautifully balanced with sweet caramelized onions for a sweet-savory harmony.

items.name: Spinach & Roasted Pine Nuts
items.description: Fresh spinach leaves and toasted Spanish pine nuts folded into our light bechamel, offering a clean, nutty finish.

items.name: Slow-Cooked oxtail (Rabo de Toro)
items.description: Melt-in-your-mouth shredded oxtail beef braised in Spanish red wine, encased in an ultra-crispy breadcrumb crust.

items.name: Garlic Shrimp (Gambas al Ajillo)
items.description: Plump prawns sautéed in garlic-infused olive oil with a touch of red pepper flakes, bringing hot tapas direct to you.
